original_image_tags: A handwritten letter on aged, off-white paper. The text is written in blue ink in cursive script. Two black ink blots, possibly redactions or stains, are visible on the top line. The paper has a slightly uneven top edge and shows signs of age.

elements.description: A single page of aged, off-white paper containing extensive cursive handwriting in black ink. The page includes two small black circular holes near the top edge. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts present.

judge.reason: Descriptions contradict each other on the ink color (blue vs. black) and the nature of the marks (ink blots vs. holes).
